title: Mobile user uninstalls the mobile app
scenario: User status on Lens tenant Manage/Device Users page does not change to inactive after uninstalling Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Ensure the user is registered on the Lens tenant with an active status on the Manage/Device Users page.
2. On the mobile device, uninstall the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Open a web browser and navigate to the Lens tenant's Manage/Device Users page.
4. Locate the user's entry in the device users list.
expected: The mobile user's status on the Lens tenant Manage/Device Users page changes to "Inactive".
